theme_and_archetype.name: Tactical Command (Archetype 2/4 Hybrid)
theme_and_archetype.justification: The application needs a gritty, military, and survivalist feel consistent with SCUM, but must operate as a highly professional command-center server manager. It uses Archetype 4 (High-Contrast/Swiss structure) for intense data clarity and Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) for the tactical, aggressive visual styling.

hierarchy.h1_hero: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter text-blacksite-100
hierarchy.h2_section: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight text-blacksite-200
hierarchy.overline_label: text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-blacksite-400

typography.instruction: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or generic fonts. Rajdhani provides the sharp, military HUD aesthetic for headings, while IBM Plex Sans ensures absolute readability for massive configuration tables.

layout_strategy.structure: Dashboard-first with a fixed TOP NAVIGATION bar. NO left sidebar. Full-width modular content.
layout_strategy.spacing_scale: Aggressive, intentional spacing. Use p-6, p-8 for major sections. Data tables use p-2, p-4 for high density.
layout_strategy.borders: No rounded corners for primary structural elements. Use 'rounded-none' or subtle 'rounded-sm'. Prefer 1px hard borders or CSS clip-paths (chamfered corners) to simulate armor plating.
layout_strategy.background_textures: Layer a subtle 2% opacity noise/grain over the main background to eliminate digital flatness. Apply repeating-linear-gradient scanlines for empty states or active terminal zones.
layout_strategy.grid_system: Use 'grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4' with 'gap-6'. Server cards are full width inside their grid columns. Settings tabs use pure CSS Grid for categorized dense data.

TopNav.description: Tactical HUD Nav Bar spanning 100% width at the top.
TopNav.styles: h-16 bg-blacksite-surface border-b-2 border-blacksite-border fixed top-0 w-full z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-6. Optional bottom glowing border in accent_amber during updates.
TopNav.elements: Left: Military Stencil Logo + Brand Text. Center: Main Navigation (Dashboard, Configs, Logs). Right: Global Actions (Update Manager, Start All) and Theme Toggle.

StatusRibbon.description: Information bar positioned directly below the Top Nav.
StatusRibbon.styles: h-10 bg-[#000000] border-b border-blacksite-border flex items-center px-6 gap-8 font-mono text-xs text-blacksite-300.
StatusRibbon.elements: Connected Disk [C:\ 1TB / 2TB Free], Active Servers: 3/5, System CPU/RAM, Network Status (Green Pulse LED).

ServerCard.description: Operator Dossier/Loadout Card. Distinctly NOT a generic SaaS card.
ServerCard.styles: bg-blacksite-surface border border-blacksite-border rounded-none p-5 relative overflow-hidden transition-all duration-200 hover:border-blacksite-border_focus hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] group
ServerCard.elements: Top right: Pulsing Status LED. Header: Server Name in uppercase. Mid: Grid of vitals (Players, Uptime, CPU). Bottom: Weaponized CTA buttons (Start, Stop, Update).
ServerCard.special_effect: Add a pseudo-element scanline on hover.

GlobalActionBar.description: User requested specific global action buttons. Embedded within TopNav or StatusRibbon.
GlobalActionBar.button_styles: bg-blacksite-surface border border-blacksite-border px-4 py-2 uppercase font-bold text-xs tracking-widest hover:bg-blacksite-primary hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center gap-2

DetailPanel.description: Tabbed view for hundreds of server settings (ServerSettings.ini, etc.).
DetailPanel.tabs_style: flex border-b border-blacksite-border mb-6 overflow-x-auto. Tab items are px-4 py-2 font-bold text-sm uppercase text-blacksite-400 hover:text-blacksite-200. Active tab has border-b-2 border-blacksite-primary text-blacksite-100.
DetailPanel.form_grid: Dense 2-col or 3-col grid. Input fields have flat dark background with bottom border only, focus states glow amber.

DiskSelectionWizard.description: First-launch modal mimicking a boot sequence.
DiskSelectionWizard.styles: Fixed full screen overlay bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-sm z-[100] flex items-center justify-center. Modal box is raw metal themed: border-2 border-blacksite-border bg-[#0A0A0C] p-8 max-w-2xl w-full.
DiskSelectionWizard.elements: Monospace boot logs 'INITIALIZING SCUM MANAGER...', Disk selection grid with capacity bars (using monospace block characters or sharp progress bars), 'REQUEST ADMIN PRIVILEGE' giant amber button.

InstallProgressModal.styles: bg-[#050505] border border-blacksite-border p-4 font-mono text-xs text-emerald-500 overflow-y-auto max-h-96
InstallProgressModal.elements: Live scrolling text, sharp green/amber progress bar for the ~20GB download.

micro_interactions.buttons: Hovering over primary buttons should invert colors or slide a solid color from the left. Destructive buttons should have a CSS-striped background.
micro_interactions.led_pulse: Use `@keyframes pulse-glow` for status dots (Green = Running, Red = Stopped).
micro_interactions.scanlines: Overlay `repeating-linear-gradient(transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 3px)` on server cards.
micro_interactions.hover_lifts: Slight `-translate-y-[2px]` and intense drop-shadow for interactive cards.

media.instructions: Use 'dark_metal' as a fixed background overlay with low opacity (0.05) or blend-mode multiply. 'scum_survivor' can be used as the backdrop for the First-Launch Disk Selection Wizard, heavily darkened with a black gradient.

implementation_rules.file_type: MUST use .js and .jsx extensions. DO NOT use .tsx or .ts.
implementation_rules.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="start-server-button"`).
implementation_rules.shadcn_customization: Do not use default Shadcn rounded borders. Override `radius` in global CSS to `0` or `0.125rem`. Override default Shadcn ring colors with the theme's accent_amber.
implementation_rules.icons: Use `lucide-react`. Use sharp, technical icons like `Terminal`, `Server`, `HardDrive`, `ShieldAlert`, `Crosshair`.
implementation_rules.forms: When implementing the massive settings form, use a virtualized list or strictly paginated/tabbed categories to ensure performance. Ensure Shadcn select and inputs have sharp corners.
